requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Colombia
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——哥伦比亚无横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——哥倫比亞無橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Colombia does not operate a horizontal RoHS-type technical regulation that restricts a defined list of hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, phthalates) in homogeneous materials of electrical and electronic equipment as a market-entry condition. The mandatory Colombian regulatory framework for LED luminaires is centred on electrical safety and lighting performance (RETIE, RETILAP) plus energy labelling (RETIQ), not substance restriction. Mercury in certain lamp types is constrained indirectly via Colombia's commitments under the Minamata Convention on Mercury and related environmental rules, and general chemical-management and hazardous-waste rules exist, but there is no single horizontal substance-restriction regime equivalent to EU RoHS applied to LED luminaire materials as a condition of placing the product on the market.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚没有横向 RoHS 型技术法规——即将电气电子设备均质材料中规定的有害物质清单（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE、邻苯二甲酸酯）限制作为市场准入条件。哥伦比亚针对 LED 灯具的强制性监管框架以电气安全和照明性能（RETIE、RETILAP）加能效标签（RETIQ）为核心，而非物质限制。某些灯型中的汞通过哥伦比亚在《关于汞的水俣公约》下的承诺及相关环境规则间接受限，且存在一般化学品管理及危险废物规则，但不存在相当于欧盟 RoHS、作为产品上市条件适用于 LED 灯具材料的单一横向物质限制制度。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞沒有橫向 RoHS 型技術法規——即將電氣電子設備均質材料中規定的有害物質清單（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE、鄰苯二甲酸酯）限制作為市場准入條件。哥倫比亞針對 LED 燈具的強制性監管框架以電氣安全和照明性能（RETIE、RETILAP）加能效標籤（RETIQ）為核心，而非物質限制。某些燈型中的汞通過哥倫比亞在《關於汞的水俁公約》下的承諾及相關環境規則間接受限，且存在一般化學品管理及危險廢物規則，但不存在相當於歐盟 RoHS、作為產品上市條件適用於 LED 燈具材料的單一橫向物質限制制度。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-equivalent technical regulation in Colombia for LED luminaire materials as of 2026
Minamata Convention on Mercury (Colombia is a party) — relevant to mercury in lamps, indirect
General Colombian chemical-management and hazardous-waste rules (not a product substance-restriction regime)

summary.en: China operates China RoHS via GB/T 26572 (concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE — covering the original 6 substances Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) and SJ/T 11364 (China RoHS 2 disclosure marking), which requires an orange/green hazardous-substance disclosure label on EEE sold in China. China RoHS focuses on disclosure labelling and (for products in the catalogue) conformity, rather than a single CCC-style market ban for all substances. The 4 EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not in the GB/T 26572 mandatory list as of 2026.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 26572（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求——涵盖原 6 项物质铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE）及 SJ/T 11364（中国 RoHS 2 披露标识）实施中国 RoHS，后者要求在中国销售的电气电子设备上贴附橙/绿色有害物质披露标识。中国 RoHS 侧重披露标签及（对达标管理目录内产品的）符合性，而非对所有物质的单一 CCC 式市场禁令。截至 2026 年，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在 GB/T 26572 强制清单中。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 26572（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求——涵蓋原 6 項物質鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE）及 SJ/T 11364（中國 RoHS 2 披露標識）實施中國 RoHS，後者要求在中國銷售的電氣電子設備上貼附橙/綠色有害物質披露標識。中國 RoHS 側重披露標籤及（對達標管理目錄內產品的）符合性，而非對所有物質的單一 CCC 式市場禁令。截至 2026 年，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在 GB/T 26572 強制清單中。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Honest mapping: unlike the EU, Colombia has no horizontal RoHS regime, so there is no Colombian substance-restriction market-entry test to satisfy for LED luminaire materials — and, notably, China's own China RoHS (GB/T 26572 disclosure) is in some respects more developed on this dimension than Colombia's framework. Practical implications: (1) a Chinese manufacturer's existing China RoHS disclosure does not need a Colombian RoHS counterpart because none exists; (2) however, mercury-containing lamp types may be constrained by Colombia's Minamata Convention obligations and environmental rules — verify if the product contains mercury; (3) general hazardous-waste and chemical rules can still apply to import/disposal but are not a product RoHS test; (4) buyers or supply chains may contractually request RoHS/REACH-style declarations even though Colombian law does not mandate them. Do not assume an EU-style RoHS certificate is required for Colombia, but keep substance documentation available for commercial and environmental purposes.
gap.zh: 诚实映射：与欧盟不同，哥伦比亚无横向 RoHS 制度，故对 LED 灯具材料无须满足哥伦比亚物质限制市场准入测试——且值得注意的是，中国自身的中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572 披露）在此维度上某些方面比哥伦比亚框架更完善。实际影响：（1）中国制造商现有的中国 RoHS 披露无须哥伦比亚 RoHS 对应，因其不存在；（2）但含汞灯型可能受哥伦比亚《水俣公约》义务及环境规则约束——须核实产品是否含汞；（3）一般危险废物及化学品规则仍可能适用于进口/处置，但非产品 RoHS 测试；（4）即使哥伦比亚法律未强制，买方或供应链仍可能按合同要求 RoHS/REACH 式声明。请勿假设哥伦比亚要求欧盟式 RoHS 证书，但应为商业及环境目的保留物质文件。
gap.zht: 誠實映射：與歐盟不同，哥倫比亞無橫向 RoHS 制度，故對 LED 燈具材料無須滿足哥倫比亞物質限制市場准入測試——且值得注意的是，中國自身的中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572 披露）在此維度上某些方面比哥倫比亞框架更完善。實際影響：（1）中國製造商現有的中國 RoHS 披露無須哥倫比亞 RoHS 對應，因其不存在；（2）但含汞燈型可能受哥倫比亞《水俁公約》義務及環境規則約束——須核實產品是否含汞；（3）一般危險廢物及化學品規則仍可能適用於進口/處置，但非產品 RoHS 測試；（4）即使哥倫比亞法律未強制，買方或供應鏈仍可能按合同要求 RoHS/REACH 式聲明。請勿假設哥倫比亞要求歐盟式 RoHS 證書，但應為商業及環境目的保留物質文件。

mandatory_status.target: Not required (no horizontal regime) — Colombia has no RoHS-equivalent substance-restriction technical regulation for LED luminaire materials as a market-entry condition; mercury in lamps may be constrained indirectly via Minamata/environmental rules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) and GB/T 26572 limits for the original 6 substances apply to EEE sold in China

source.publisher: Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible de Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia has no horizontal RoHS-equivalent substance-restriction regime for LED luminaire materials as a market-entry condition, so there is no Colombian RoHS test to pass — and China's own China RoHS disclosure framework is comparatively more developed on this dimension. Mercury-containing lamps may be indirectly constrained by Colombia's Minamata Convention obligations; verify mercury content. Keep substance/RoHS declarations available for commercial and environmental purposes even though Colombian law does not mandate an EU-style RoHS certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚无作为市场准入条件的横向 RoHS 式物质限制制度适用于 LED 灯具材料，故无哥伦比亚 RoHS 测试须通过——且中国自身的中国 RoHS 披露框架在此维度上相对更完善。含汞灯可能受哥伦比亚《水俣公约》义务间接约束；须核实汞含量。即使哥伦比亚法律未强制欧盟式 RoHS 证书，仍应为商业及环境目的保留物质/RoHS 声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞無作為市場准入條件的橫向 RoHS 式物質限制制度適用於 LED 燈具材料，故無哥倫比亞 RoHS 測試須通過——且中國自身的中國 RoHS 披露框架在此維度上相對更完善。含汞燈可能受哥倫比亞《水俁公約》義務間接約束；須核實汞含量。即使哥倫比亞法律未強制歐盟式 RoHS 證書，仍應為商業及環境目的保留物質/RoHS 聲明。

requirement_topic.en: No REACH-Style SVHC Supply-Chain Notification Regime in Colombia
requirement_topic.zh: 哥伦比亚无 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报制度
requirement_topic.zht: 哥倫比亞無 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報制度

summary.en: Colombia does not have a REACH-equivalent regime that requires proactive supply-chain notification of Substances of Very High Concern (SVHC) above 0.1% w/w in articles, nor a SCIP-style central product-substance database for articles. Colombia manages chemicals through hazard-classification and labelling rules (its GHS-based system for chemicals), workplace and environmental chemical-safety rules, and import controls for specific controlled substances, but there is no article-level SVHC candidate-list tracking obligation imposed on LED luminaire suppliers as a condition of market access. The binding mandatory regime for LED luminaires remains RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ plus, for wireless, CRC/ANE.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚没有相当于 REACH 的制度——即要求对物品中浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）的高度关注物质（SVHC）进行主动供应链通报，也无物品层面的 SCIP 式中央产品物质数据库。哥伦比亚通过危害分类及标签规则（其基于 GHS 的化学品制度）、工作场所及环境化学品安全规则，以及特定受控物质进口管制来管理化学品，但未对 LED 灯具供应商施加作为市场准入条件的物品层面 SVHC 候选清单跟踪义务。LED 灯具的约束性强制制度仍为 RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ，无线产品另加 CRC/ANE。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞沒有相當於 REACH 的制度——即要求對物品中濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）的高度關注物質（SVHC）進行主動供應鏈通報，也無物品層面的 SCIP 式中央產品物質數據庫。哥倫比亞通過危害分類及標籤規則（其基於 GHS 的化學品制度）、工作場所及環境化學品安全規則，以及特定受控物質進口管制來管理化學品，但未對 LED 燈具供應商施加作為市場准入條件的物品層面 SVHC 候選清單跟蹤義務。LED 燈具的約束性強制制度仍為 RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ，無線產品另加 CRC/ANE。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-equivalent article-level SVHC supply-chain notification regime in Colombia as of 2026
Colombian GHS-based chemical hazard classification and labelling rules (substance/mixture level, not article SVHC tracking)

summary.en: China likewise does not have a direct equivalent to the REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC supply-chain notification obligation. China's closest instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) for new-substance registration and GB 30981 / GHS-based classification and labelling rules for hazardous chemicals. Neither China nor Colombia imposes a REACH-style biannual candidate-list screening and B2B/consumer notification duty on LED luminaire articles.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品层面 SVHC 供应链通报义务的制度。中国最接近的工具是生态环境部令第 12 号（新化学物质环境管理登记办法）用于新物质登记，以及 GB 30981 / 基于 GHS 的危险化学品分类和标签规则。中国与哥伦比亚均未对 LED 灯具物品施加 REACH 式每半年候选清单筛查及 B2B/消费者通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品層面 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務的制度。中國最接近的工具是生態環境部令第 12 號（新化學物質環境管理登記辦法）用於新物質登記，以及 GB 30981 / 基於 GHS 的危險化學品分類和標籤規則。中國與哥倫比亞均未對 LED 燈具物品施加 REACH 式每半年候選清單篩查及 B2B/消費者通報義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981 — Classification and labelling of chemicals (China, GHS-based)

gap.en: Honest mapping: neither Colombia nor China imposes a REACH-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty, so for the China-to-Colombia route there is no SVHC candidate-list tracking or SCIP-style registration obligation to add — this EU-specific burden simply does not transfer. Practical notes: (1) a Chinese exporter does not need to set up biannual ECHA candidate-list screening for Colombian market access; (2) GHS-based hazard labelling rules apply at the substance/mixture level (e.g., for any chemicals shipped), not to the finished LED luminaire as an article; (3) commercial buyers or multinational supply chains may still contractually request REACH/SVHC declarations even though Colombian law does not require them. Verify only that any controlled-substance import rules and mercury (Minamata) considerations are addressed, rather than building a REACH compliance process.
gap.zh: 诚实映射：哥伦比亚与中国均未施加 REACH 式物品层面 SVHC 供应链通报义务，故对中国至哥伦比亚路线，无须新增 SVHC 候选清单跟踪或 SCIP 式注册义务——这一欧盟特有负担并不转移。实际说明：（1）中国出口商无须为哥伦比亚市场准入建立每半年 ECHA 候选清单筛查；（2）基于 GHS 的危害标签规则适用于物质/混合物层面（如任何运输化学品），而非作为物品的成品 LED 灯具；（3）即使哥伦比亚法律未要求，商业买方或跨国供应链仍可能按合同要求 REACH/SVHC 声明。仅须核实已处理任何受控物质进口规则及汞（水俣）考量，而非建立 REACH 合规流程。
gap.zht: 誠實映射：哥倫比亞與中國均未施加 REACH 式物品層面 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，故對中國至哥倫比亞路線，無須新增 SVHC 候選清單跟蹤或 SCIP 式注冊義務——這一歐盟特有負擔並不轉移。實際說明：（1）中國出口商無須為哥倫比亞市場准入建立每半年 ECHA 候選清單篩查；（2）基於 GHS 的危害標籤規則適用於物質/混合物層面（如任何運輸化學品），而非作為物品的成品 LED 燈具；（3）即使哥倫比亞法律未要求，商業買方或跨國供應鏈仍可能按合同要求 REACH/SVHC 聲明。僅須核實已處理任何受控物質進口規則及汞（水俁）考量，而非建立 REACH 合規流程。

mandatory_status.target: Not required (no equivalent) — Colombia has no REACH-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification or SCIP-style database obligation for LED luminaires as of 2026
mandatory_status.cn: Not required (no equivalent) — China has no REACH Article 33-equivalent article-level SVHC supply-chain notification obligation

source.publisher: Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible de Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia has no REACH-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification regime and no SCIP-style database, and China has no direct equivalent either — so this EU-specific obligation does not transfer to the China-to-Colombia route. GHS-based hazard labelling applies at the substance/mixture level, not to the finished luminaire as an article. Commercial buyers may still request REACH/SVHC declarations contractually; otherwise, focus on controlled-substance import rules and mercury (Minamata) rather than building a REACH process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚无 REACH 式物品层面 SVHC 供应链通报制度，亦无 SCIP 式数据库，中国也无直接对应——故该欧盟特有义务不转移至中国至哥伦比亚路线。基于 GHS 的危害标签适用于物质/混合物层面，而非作为物品的成品灯具。商业买方仍可能按合同要求 REACH/SVHC 声明；否则应聚焦受控物质进口规则及汞（水俣），而非建立 REACH 流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞無 REACH 式物品層面 SVHC 供應鏈通報制度，亦無 SCIP 式數據庫，中國也無直接對應——故該歐盟特有義務不轉移至中國至哥倫比亞路線。基於 GHS 的危害標籤適用於物質/混合物層面，而非作為物品的成品燈具。商業買方仍可能按合同要求 REACH/SVHC 聲明；否則應聚焦受控物質進口規則及汞（水俁），而非建立 REACH 流程。

requirement_topic.en: Certificate of Conformity Process and Importer Registration vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 合格证书流程与进口商登记 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 合格證書流程與進口商登記 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Market access for LED luminaires in Colombia requires: (1) test the product to the applicable adopted NTC/IEC standards (IEC 60598-1 for luminaires, IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, IEC 62471 for photobiological safety, CISPR 15 for radio disturbance) at Colombian 110/220 V, 60 Hz conditions; (2) obtain a Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) from a certification body accredited by ONAC, demonstrating compliance with RETIE and RETILAP; (3) for in-scope products, obtain the RETIQ energy-efficiency label and Certificate of Conformity; (4) for wireless products, obtain CRC/ANE radio approval; (5) appoint or work through an in-country importer who registers the certificate and is the responsible party before SIC; (6) provide Spanish-language labelling, technical documentation, and declared parameters. SIC conducts market surveillance and customs verification (ports such as Cartagena and Buenaventura).
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚 LED 灯具的市场准入要求：（1）按适用采纳的 NTC/IEC 标准（灯具 IEC 60598-1、自镇流灯 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471、无线电骚扰 CISPR 15）在哥伦比亚 110/220 V、60 Hz 条件下检测产品；（2）由 ONAC 认可的认证机构出具合格证书（Certificado de Conformidad），证明符合 RETIE 及 RETILAP；（3）对适用产品取得 RETIQ 能效标签及合格证书；（4）对无线产品取得 CRC/ANE 无线电核准；（5）指定或通过在地进口商办理证书登记，作为 SIC 面前的责任方；（6）提供西班牙语标签、技术文件及声明参数。SIC 进行市场监管及海关核验（如卡塔赫纳、布埃纳文图拉等港口）。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞 LED 燈具的市場准入要求：（1）按適用採納的 NTC/IEC 標準（燈具 IEC 60598-1、自鎮流燈 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471、無線電騷擾 CISPR 15）在哥倫比亞 110/220 V、60 Hz 條件下檢測產品；（2）由 ONAC 認可的認證機構出具合格證書（Certificado de Conformidad），證明符合 RETIE 及 RETILAP；（3）對適用產品取得 RETIQ 能效標籤及合格證書；（4）對無線產品取得 CRC/ANE 無線電核准；（5）指定或通過在地進口商辦理證書登記，作為 SIC 面前的責任方；（6）提供西班牙語標籤、技術文件及聲明參數。SIC 進行市場監管及海關核驗（如卡塔赫納、布埃納文圖拉等港口）。

standards_or_laws: RETIE / RETILAP / RETIQ — mandatory technical regulations (Ministerio de Minas y Energia)
ONAC accreditation of certification bodies — Certificate of Conformity issuance
SIC — Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (market surveillance and enforcement)
CRC / ANE — radio approval for wireless products

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified by CNCA-authorized bodies such as CQC. Voluntary CQC certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC scope. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required. Chinese certification is in Chinese and conducted at 220 V, 50 Hz. CCC/CQC certificates and SRRC approvals are issued under the Chinese schemes and are not recognised by Colombia's ONAC/SIC and CRC/ANE — separate Colombian conformity assessment and importer registration are required.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为 CCC（中国强制性产品认证），由 CNCA 管理并由 CQC 等 CNCA 授权机构认证。对强制 CCC 范畴外的产品，可申请自愿性 CQC 认证。对集成无线功能的灯具，还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。中国认证以中文进行，并在 220 V、50 Hz 下进行。CCC/CQC 证书及 SRRC 核准依中国制度出具，不被哥伦比亚 ONAC/SIC 及 CRC/ANE 认可——须另行进行哥伦比亚合格评定及进口商登记。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為 CCC（中國強制性產品認證），由 CNCA 管理並由 CQC 等 CNCA 授權機構認證。對強制 CCC 範疇外的產品，可申請自願性 CQC 認證。對集成無線功能的燈具，還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。中國認證以中文進行，並在 220 V、50 Hz 下進行。CCC/CQC 證書及 SRRC 核准依中國制度出具，不被哥倫比亞 ONAC/SIC 及 CRC/ANE 認可——須另行進行哥倫比亞合格評定及進口商登記。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: The Colombian Certificate of Conformity (via ONAC-accredited bodies, against RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ) and the Chinese CCC/CQC process run in parallel with no mutual recognition — separate test reports, certificates, and processes are needed for each market. Key Colombia-specific requirements with no CN equivalent: (1) the Certificate of Conformity must be issued by an ONAC-accredited body and registered by an in-country importer who is the responsible party before SIC; (2) testing must reflect 110/220 V, 60 Hz, not China's 220 V/50 Hz — a material design/test difference; (3) all labelling and documentation must be in Spanish; (4) the RETIQ energy label is a separate mandatory marking; (5) wireless products need CRC/ANE approval (SRRC is not accepted). Unlike the EU, there is no horizontal RoHS/REACH burden to add (see ledco-rohs-01/02), but the multi-regulation conformity (RETIE + RETILAP + RETIQ) plus importer registration is the core access barrier.
gap.zh: 哥伦比亚合格证书（通过 ONAC 认可机构，依 RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ）与中国 CCC/CQC 流程并行运作，不存在互认——各市场须分别准备检测报告、证书及流程。主要哥伦比亚特有要求（无中国对应）：（1）合格证书须由 ONAC 认可机构出具，并由作为 SIC 面前责任方的在地进口商登记；（2）检测须反映 110/220 V、60 Hz，而非中国 220 V/50 Hz——这是实质性设计/检测差异；（3）所有标签及文件须为西班牙语；（4）RETIQ 能效标签是独立强制标识；（5）无线产品须 CRC/ANE 核准（SRRC 不被接受）。与欧盟不同，无须新增横向 RoHS/REACH 负担（见 ledco-rohs-01/02），但多法规符合性（RETIE + RETILAP + RETIQ）加进口商登记是核心准入壁垒。
gap.zht: 哥倫比亞合格證書（通過 ONAC 認可機構，依 RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ）與中國 CCC/CQC 流程並行運作，不存在互認——各市場須分別準備檢測報告、證書及流程。主要哥倫比亞特有要求（無中國對應）：（1）合格證書須由 ONAC 認可機構出具，並由作為 SIC 面前責任方的在地進口商登記；（2）檢測須反映 110/220 V、60 Hz，而非中國 220 V/50 Hz——這是實質性設計/檢測差異；（3）所有標籤及文件須為西班牙語；（4）RETIQ 能效標籤是獨立強制標識；（5）無線產品須 CRC/ANE 核准（SRRC 不被接受）。與歐盟不同，無須新增橫向 RoHS/REACH 負擔（見 ledco-rohs-01/02），但多法規符合性（RETIE + RETILAP + RETIQ）加進口商登記是核心准入壁壘。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Certificate of Conformity (ONAC-accredited body) against RETIE/RETILAP, RETIQ label for in-scope products, importer registration, and CRC/ANE approval for wireless products required before market placement in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for in-scope residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (SIC), Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombian market access for LED luminaires requires a Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body against RETIE/RETILAP, the RETIQ energy label for in-scope products, CRC/ANE approval for wireless products, and registration through an in-country importer who is responsible before SIC — all tested at 110/220 V, 60 Hz and documented in Spanish. Chinese CCC/CQC and SRRC are parallel, non-mutual schemes and do not transfer. Unlike the EU there is no horizontal RoHS/REACH layer, but the multi-regulation conformity plus importer registration is the core barrier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚 LED 灯具市场准入须取得 ONAC 认可机构依 RETIE/RETILAP 出具的合格证书、对适用产品取得 RETIQ 能效标签、对无线产品取得 CRC/ANE 核准，并通过作为 SIC 面前责任方的在地进口商登记——全部按 110/220 V、60 Hz 检测并以西班牙语记录。中国 CCC/CQC 及 SRRC 为并行、不互认制度，不可转用。与欧盟不同，无横向 RoHS/REACH 层级，但多法规符合性加进口商登记是核心壁垒。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞 LED 燈具市場准入須取得 ONAC 認可機構依 RETIE/RETILAP 出具的合格證書、對適用產品取得 RETIQ 能效標籤、對無線產品取得 CRC/ANE 核准，並通過作為 SIC 面前責任方的在地進口商登記——全部按 110/220 V、60 Hz 檢測並以西班牙語記錄。中國 CCC/CQC 及 SRRC 為並行、不互認制度，不可轉用。與歐盟不同，無橫向 RoHS/REACH 層級，但多法規符合性加進口商登記是核心壁壘。
